head.hi: The Spanish Chargé to the Secretary of State.

opener.dateline:
The Legation of Spain,
New York, August 1, 1905.

div.p:
Mr. Secretary: I have the honor to inform your excellency that the government of His Majesty has notified that of the Sultan of Morocco that it is disposed to take part in the conference proposed by
him, provided it be previously informed of the programme of the conference, as well as the date and the place in which it is to be held.
In thus complying with the instructions of my government I take advantage, etc.,
